description: The FinancialCalcApp project is open in Android Studio. The app contains three financial calculation classes (LoanCalculator, InvestmentAnalyzer, and BudgetPlanner) with zero test coverage. Write comprehensive unit tests in app/src/test/java/com/example/financialcalc/ using JUnit 4.13.2 and Mockito 5.8.0. Achieve at least 80% logic coverage across the three classes with a minimum of 15 @Test methods covering normal operation, edge cases (zero and maximum values), and error cases (negative inputs and invalid parameters). Ensure the project compiles and all tests pass via ./gradlew test. Login credentials: user 'ga', password 'password123'.
